message:
feat(frankenterm/main): tick 245 migrate 3 search_with_results storage sites to cx-first (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Additional storage-search surface migration. 3 sites across 3 CLI
paths:

1. L15826 saved-search scheduled-run execution:
   `storage.search_with_results_with_cx(&storage_cx, &search.query, options)`
2. L23034 saved-search manual run:
   `storage.search_with_results_with_cx(&storage_cx, &saved.query, options)`
3. L23849 unified-search lexical-mode per-pane:
   `storage.search_with_results_with_cx(&storage_cx, &query_for_storage, options)`

Standard `Cx::current().unwrap_or_else(for_request)` pattern with
locally-scoped `storage_cx`.

Verification: `cargo check -p frankenterm --bin ft` compiles clean.

Cumulative main.rs cross-crate migration through tick 245: 98 sites.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
